name: Sailors' Favorite Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together the peanut butter, shortening, and white sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Beat in the milk and vanilla extract.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt) and chocolate chips to the bowl, mixing well.
5. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 11 to 13 minutes, or until golden brown.
